Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: Gronk narrows his eyes at you, as if deciding whether to take your question seriously.

Entries.Name: Gronk
Entries.Line: Kweeza is food invented by famous chef Gorgon Trorksay.

Entries.Name: Gronk
Entries.Line: Trorksay usually respected but sometimes he make... strange concoction. Difficult food easy for him, simple meal hard. Once Trorksay even burn simple meal!

Entries.Name: Gronk
Entries.Line: But Trorksy made very bad mistake one time, when searching for still-plants... what does French one call them? Own-yo?

Entries.Name: Gronk
Entries.Line: Trorksay pick own-yo, then chop to pieces...

Entries.Name: Gronk
Entries.Line: But! Trorksay realize his mistake! He not pick own-yo but small running-plant!

Entries.Name: Gronk
Entries.Line: Running-plant now dead, but Trorksay not waste food! So Trorksay make famous Kweeza from dead running-plant.

Entries.Name: Gronk
Entries.Line: Gronk hear Kweeza tasty, but! Trork not normally eat running-plant! Only sometimes cut very ancient one to make shelter.

Entries.Name: Gronk
Entries.Line: Human also cut old tree, and running-plant forgives! Why running-plant forgive human but not Trork?

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: Gronk continues to rant for a while about his mistreatment at the hands (branches?) of Kweebecs.

Choices.Text: Kweebecs, am I right or am I right?
The market DOES feel pretty dangerous...
